title: LeafPvP
description: A Minecraft PvP texture pack which will help you raise your skill in Minecraft PVP!
body:
## The Best Minecraft PvP Texture Pack

### **🚨WARNING, THIS REQUIRES [VARIANTS CIT](https://modrinth.com/mod/variants-cit)🚨**

This pack is created for the Ultimate experience for Minecraft PvP. With Breach (Red) and Density (Blue) Maces, you can use the best weapons for that specific situation. 

Additions:
- Low Shield
- Small items (Food, XP bottles, etc.)
- Small Totem
- Transparent GUI
- Bright Cobwebs
- Bow Charger Level Indicator
- Shorter Swords

🚨DISCLAIMER🚨: I didn't make most these textures/models (They are Open source, so I am allowed to use them)
Credits:

<details>
<summary>Pack Credit</summary>

- [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/)
- [Low Fire](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/lifesteal-low-fire)
- [Translucent GUI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/translucent-gui)
- [Bow Charge Indicator](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bow-charger)
- [Dagger](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dagger-swords)
- [Eating Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/eating-animation-resource-pack)
- [Dynamic Duo](https://youtu.be/EKyLCgKcmuM?si=7wkHI68BGv9-C_VC) (For V2.0 and up)
- The rest of the Textures are by Me :D
- You can use the textures in this pack as long as it is credited towards the creators of the textures


</details>

As long as you give credit (In a "Credit.txt" file), you can use the textures for your own texture pack on modrinth

I am working on revamping all textures so there will not be many updates
